description:
Operating Area: Greece, Turkey

An extremely beautiful Greek wooden motor sailer that combines latest technology with tradition and elegance, offering a unique level of comfort, luxury, safety and reliability.

Custom designed and built at “SYROS” boatyard in Greece with passion for perfection which is evident in every last detail. It took more than four years for a selected team of famous Greek boat builders and craftsmen to complete this masterpiece.

Launched June 2001 and completed April 2004.

The boat is fitted with stabilizers and constructed with full length keel of extra height (1.1m) ensuring outstanding seakeeping capabilities.

The unusually big size of the rudder in combination with the two big propellers and the powerful bow thruster provides excellent maneuverability and additionally stable courses even in heavy seas.

blueprint.name: PAREA

amenities.label: Individual sets of batteries (main engine and generator each)
Navigation Computer with additional GPS (one laptop on bridge and one monitor 17”  in master cabin)
Telephones in each cabin, salon, bridge
GSM lines (fixed cellular terminals) with e-mail and fax services

entertainment: Satellite TV, DVD, VCR, CD/cassette stereo in salon and master cabin
Individual CD/cassette/MP3/radio stereo in each cabin
Piano/Glavinova with karaoke and CD player in salon

crew.name: Dimitris Drakos
crew.bio:
Greek and fluent in English

Captain Drakos is a highly skilled and experienced sailor with over 10 years of experience in the marine industry and in yachting. He has extensively cruised the Eastern Mediterranean and the Greek waters.
He has graduated from the prestigious Merchant Marine Academy of Epirus and has developed his seamanship abilities over years of navigating various types of vessels through diverse and challenging conditions.
Captain Drakos rejoined Liana H this year after having worked there as Captain some years ago. Captain Drakos knows how to design exciting itineraries for his guests based on his excellent knowledge of the Greek islands and by liaising closely with the guests and taking into consideration their preferences.
With a strong commitment to safety and excellence, Captain Drakos has proven himself as a reliable and capable leader, managing both the ship and his crew with efficiency and professionalism. He offers an enthusiasm that blends well with the positive attitude of his entire crew. Guests can feel comfortable and safe in Captain Drakos's capable and experienced hands.

crew.name: Kostas Passaris
crew.bio:
With over a decade of hands-on experience in yacht engineering and maritime operations, Konstantinos Passaris is the backbone of LIANA H’s technical excellence. A highly skilled and dedicated professional, Konstantinos ensures that every journey is smooth, safe, and worry-free for our guests.
His extensive background in marine mechanics, vessel maintenance, and onboard operations allows him to anticipate and resolve any technical challenges before they arise. From overseeing the optimal performance of engines and mechanical systems to managing deck operations and passenger safety, his precision and problem-solving abilities make him an invaluable part of the crew.
Konstantinos holds multiple certifications, including an RYA Yacht Master Diploma, a Short-Range VHF Operator’s License, and a Speedboat Operator’s License, demonstrating his expertise in both engineering and navigation. His strong organizational skills, team spirit, and keen attention to detail ensure that every aspect of the vessel runs seamlessly.
Beyond his technical expertise, Konstantinos is passionate about providing an exceptional experience for our guests. Whether it’s ensuring the smooth execution of a luxury cruise itinerary or managing maintenance with meticulous care, his hard work and commitment shine through in everything he does.
Onboard LIANA H, Konstantinos is not just a technical master—he is the guardian of reliability, safety, and excellence at sea.

crew.name: Katerina Tasouli
crew.bio:
With nearly two decades of culinary experience at sea, Katerina Tasouli is the heart and soul of the gastronomic experience aboard LIANA H. A master of Mediterranean cuisine with a deep passion for fresh, locally sourced ingredients, Katerina crafts exquisite dishes that delight even the most discerning palates.

Her journey as a yacht chef has taken her across luxury sailing and motor yachts, refining her skills in Italian and Mediterranean flavors while mastering the art of cooking in the unique conditions of the open sea. From elegant multi-course meals to authentic, home-style delicacies, her menus are tailored to each guest’s preferences, ensuring an unforgettable dining experience.

Beyond her culinary talents, Katerina brings a strong sense of teamwork, leadership, and impeccable organization to every charter. Her dedication to perfection, ability to adapt to dynamic environments, and unwavering commitment to excellence make her an invaluable member of the LIANA H crew.

Whether preparing a lavish seafood feast under the stars or a comforting meal after a day of adventure, Katerina’s creations highlight every journey aboard LIANA H.

crew.name: Joel Nivera
crew.bio:
With decades of hands-on experience in the maritime industry, Joel Nivera is a highly skilled and dedicated sailor. His career spans over 15 years, during which he has honed his expertise aboard both fast boats and professional sailing vessels.
Currently serving as a crew member on LIANA H he plays an integral role in ensuring smooth operations, safety, and exceptional service for guests and crew alike. His previous roles at sea, have equipped him with extensive knowledge of vessel handling, navigation, and teamwork under demanding conditions.
Joel combines technical proficiency with an innate passion for the sea. His strong team spirit and ability to work seamlessly with crew members make him an invaluable asset. Fluent in English, he communicates effectively with international guests, ensuring top-tier service and professionalism.
Beyond his maritime career, Joel has a deep appreciation for outdoor activities, with biking and fishing being among his favorite pastimes. His unwavering commitment to excellence and passion for the maritime world continue to define his outstanding career at sea.

crew.name: Katerina Bessa
crew.bio:
With a distinguished career spanning over a decade in luxury hospitality and yachting, Katerina Bessa brings unparalleled expertise, elegance, and attention to detail to M/Y Liana H. As Chief Stewardess, she ensures that every guest experiences the highest level of service, comfort, and sophistication during their charter.

Katerina's fine dining, event planning, and interior design background makes her an invaluable asset to the yacht. Having honed her skills in prestigious restaurants and high-end estates across Greece and Switzerland, she seamlessly orchestrates every aspect of onboard hospitality, from exquisite table settings and personalized service to refined event organization and impeccable housekeeping.

Her deep understanding of yacht operations and extensive certifications—including fire prevention, medical first aid, and security awareness—ensures a safe and well-managed environment for guests and crew alike. A natural leader, Katerina is known for her warm demeanor, professionalism, and ability to anticipate guests' every need, creating an atmosphere of effortless luxury.

With her passion for the sea, commitment to excellence, and dedication to making every journey unforgettable, Katerina sets the standard for five-star service aboard M/Y Liana H. Guests can expect nothing less than perfection under her attentive care.
